original: You dodge out of its path.
You taste iron, and you’re knocked to a place where it seems as if the battle is coming from a long way away...
You manage to sidestep the dart.
The dart breaks apart on your shield.
The dart pricks into you, releasing its lusty, woozy payload.
You manage to wrench yourself out of his grip.
You can’t stop yourself being pulled down in turn! The remaining zil cheer and close in, scenting victory.
You duck out of the way.
It splatters across you, and you groan as the scent and flavor of it works itself into your head...

From left to right is a cornucopia of frenzied insectile lust, and it’s difficult not to be overwhelmed by it. It seems to have only been opened in front of you for a few mere moments though before a wave of freshly relieved wasp fighters are back on their feet and charging back into the fray, triumphantly resuming that deafening hum-cry of theirs.
